metadata.description: Skylence Claude Code marketplace. One plugin: skylence — author, run, lint, and debug .sky workflows for the Skylence harness builder.

plugins.name: skylence
plugins.description: Skylence .sky workflow authoring and operation. 1 agent (skylence-workflow-author), 4 slash commands (workflow-new, run, lint, doctor), and 5 skills: four-delimiter .sky format, sky CLI reference, debugging failed runs, MUST/MUST NOT rules, and a meta-workflows catalogue. Bundles 5 MCP servers via .mcp.json (sky mcp stdio plus HTTP endpoints for skylence-content, skyline, skyway, and skybox) and 13 LSP servers via .lsp.json (sky lsp stdio plus the official Claude Code language servers: clangd, csharp-ls, gopls, jdtls, kotlin-lsp, lua, intelephense, pyright, ruby-lsp, rust-analyzer, sourcekit-lsp, typescript). Prerequisite: the sky binary on PATH.
